title: macrothelypteris oligophlebia

parts: Macrothelypteris oligophlebia has many medicinal parts, such as leaves, roots, and rhizomes, which are used in traditional medicine. The leaves of the plant are rich in flavonoids, including kaempferol and quercetin, which are known for their anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The roots of Macrothelypteris oligophlebia contain alkaloids, such as berberine and palmatine, which have antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. side_effects: Macrothelypteris oligophlebia can have side effects if used improperly, such as skin irritation, allergic reactions, and respiratory problems due to the presence of allergenic compounds and volatile oils.
